problem id: 7064acac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11000000 -> 11110011
  00011110 -> 10011110
  00110011 -> 00001100
  00011100 -> 00111110
  10101111 -> 11000111
  10001101 -> 01100111
  10111101 -> 01100110
  11100000 -> 11110011
  10010001 -> 10100110

query: 00111000
predicted answer: 01111100
